--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@
         scene_codes = self.model([pil_image], device=self.device)

         return scene_codes[0]

 

-    def _get_rays(self, cam, H=256, W=256, fovy_deg=40.0):

+    def _get_rays(self, cam, H=256, W=256, fovy_deg=30.0):

         """Compute rays matching TripoSR's get_spherical_cameras (Convention A)."""

         elevation = torch.tensor([cam['elevation'] * math.pi / 180.0],

                                  dtype=torch.float32, device=self.device)
